headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Health Care Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks during market turbulence. Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page provides latest analyst takes on top stocks, sorted by accuracy. Ratings for three high-yielding health care stocks: VTRS, MDT, GSK. VTRS to report Q2 results on Aug.6, MDT recalls certain catheter system, GSK reports positive trial results. Benzinga Pro's newsfeed provides real-time alerts.
